description: PROP-001 and PROP-002 are marked 'required: true' in verification-architecture.md and specified as Tier 1 (property-based tests with fast-check). The test file imports fc from '@fast-check/vitest' at line 12 but never uses it. PROP-001 test (step2-serialize-note.test.ts lines 125-132) calls serializeNote twice with the same hardcoded input and asserts equality -- this is an example-based test, NOT a property-based test. A genuine property test would generate random ValidatedSaveRequest inputs via fast-check arbitraries and verify referential transparency across all generated cases. PROP-002 test (line 68) similarly uses a single hardcoded input. Both fail to meet Tier 1 requirements.
